title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a part-time job.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you apply for the weekend job at the sports centre? || Woman: Yes, and I got an interview. The pay isn't amazing, but the hours are fine. || Man: Will it help with your course? || Woman: [8]That's why I applied, really. I want to work with children later, and this job includes helping with kids' swimming classes[/8]. It should give me useful experience. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you apply for the weekend job at the sports centre?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and I got an interview. The pay isn't amazing, but the hours are fine.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Will it help with your course?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's why I applied, really. I want to work with children later, and this job includes helping with kids' swimming classes. It should give me useful experience.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: Why did the woman apply for the job?

options.A: It could help with her future career.

questions.explanation: She says the job includes helping with children's swimming classes, which will give useful experience.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a family party.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How was your grandmother's birthday party? || Man: Lovely. We had it in my uncle's garden because the weather stayed dry. || Woman: Did many people come? || Man: Yes, but [9]the best moment was when my grandmother saw the photo album we'd made for her[/9]. She was so surprised she couldn't speak for a moment. || Man: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How was your grandmother's birthday party?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Lovely. We had it in my uncle's garden because the weather stayed dry.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did many people come?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but the best moment was when my grandmother saw the photo album we'd made for her. She was so surprised she couldn't speak for a moment.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

questions.question: What did the man enjoy most about the party?

options.B: seeing his grandmother's reaction to a present
options.C: meeting relatives he had not seen for years

questions.explanation: He says the best moment was when his grandmother saw the photo album.

extracts.context: You will hear two students talking about a new teacher.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: What do you think of our new maths teacher? || Man: He's friendly, and he explains things slowly, which helps. || Woman: So you're happy? || Man: Mostly, but [10]he gives us homework at the end of the lesson, then the bell rings before we can ask questions about it[/10]. I sometimes start it without knowing exactly what to do. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What do you think of our new maths teacher?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: He's friendly, and he explains things slowly, which helps.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So you're happy?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Mostly, but he gives us homework at the end of the lesson, then the bell rings before we can ask questions about it. I sometimes start it without knowing exactly what to do.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

questions.question: What problem does the man mention?

options.B: The homework is always too easy.
options.C: There is no time to ask about homework.

questions.explanation: He says the bell rings before they can ask questions about the homework.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a beach clean-up.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How did the beach clean-up go? || Woman: Really well. I expected only a few people, but lots of families came. || Man: Did you collect much rubbish? || Woman: Yes, but [11]what made me happiest was seeing young children asking why people leave plastic on the beach[/11]. It felt like they were learning something important. || Man: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time. || Woman: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How did the beach clean-up go?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Really well. I expected only a few people, but lots of families came.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you collect much rubbish?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but what made me happiest was seeing young children asking why people leave plastic on the beach. It felt like they were learning something important.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful.

questions.question: What pleased the woman most about the clean-up?

options.A: Children became interested in protecting the beach.
options.B: Very little rubbish was found there.
options.C: Only a small group of people came.

questions.explanation: She says she was happiest when children asked about plastic on the beach.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a television drama.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you watch the last episode of that drama? || Woman: Yes. The acting was good, and the ending was clever, but I felt a little lost. || Man: Why? || Woman: [12]There were too many characters with similar names, so I kept forgetting who was connected to whom[/12]. Maybe I should watch the series again. || Woman: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful. || Man: That's true. It's much better to notice the problem early than be surprised later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you watch the last episode of that drama?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. The acting was good, and the ending was clever, but I felt a little lost.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: There were too many characters with similar names, so I kept forgetting who was connected to whom. Maybe I should watch the series again.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's true. It's much better to notice the problem early than be surprised later.

questions.question: What problem did the woman have with the drama?

options.B: It was hard to follow the characters.

questions.explanation: She says there were too many characters with similar names and she forgot their connections.

extracts.context: You will hear a man talking about a new gym.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I joined the new gym because it has a pool and modern equipment. The staff are friendly, and the changing rooms are clean. I don't mind that it's a little more expensive than my old gym. [13]The real problem is parking; in the evening I often drive round for ten minutes before finding a space[/13]. I may start going in the mornings instead. || Speaker: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I joined the new gym because it has a pool and modern equipment. The staff are friendly, and the changing rooms are clean. I don't mind that it's a little more expensive than my old gym. The real problem is parking; in the evening I often drive round for ten minutes before finding a space. I may start going in the mornings instead.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

questions.question: What problem does the man have with the gym?

options.B: The changing rooms are not clean.
options.C: It is difficult to park there.

questions.explanation: He says he often drives round for ten minutes before finding a parking space.
